author: Kathryn Lundstrom
title: Walmart Targets Small Businesses With Streaming Ad Marketplace
description: With the launch of a new marketplace called Connect Select, the retail giant is making connected TV ad inventory available through Walmart DSP alongside search and display.
content: The retail giant is launching a new marketplace called Connect Select that makes streaming TV ads available to buy through Walmart DSPWalmart’s demand-side platformalongside search and display ads. A… [+430 chars]
